description: Late accounts in Judaeo-Arabic, very neat, laid out in a grid according to parshiyot, probably donations collected from the people named. Dozens of names appear here; see tags for other documents mentioning the same surnames.
tags: lumbroso, Karo, Palombo, Romano, late donations, Bialobos, late prosopography, Gallico, nunez, Yu'bas
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
